info.name: IoT Hub API
info.description:
API for managing devices, telemetry, and rules with full CRUD support, JWT authentication,
pagination, schema versioning, and example payloads for testing.

request.description:
Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token.
The token must be used in the `Authorization` header for all protected endpoints.

response.name: Invalid JSON or invalid request payload

request.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Returns a single device by its unique identifier.

}

request.description:
Replaces the entire rule definition.
All rule fields must be provided in the request body.
Missing fields will be overwritten with new values.

request.description:
Accepts events originating from external systems such as webhooks or third-party IoT platforms.
The event is validated and mapped to internal actions (for example creating an Event or triggering a Rule).

### Example Use Case
An external IoT platform detects high temperature and sends a webhook to this endpoint.
The system maps the event to an internal rule and creates an Event record.
